full_content: Deliberation Archive record DELIB-0877 version 2: owner added a dashboard/web control-plane mechanism to the GT-KB/application isolation planning program. The updated planning record classifies this as Approach E, adds control-plane interdependencies and risks, and expands the priority backlog from GTKB-ISOLATION-001 through GTKB-ISOLATION-008 with a new Phase 4 plan for dashboard control plane and programmatic operations.
explicit_change_request: Owner stated that an additional mechanism should be considered: programmatic tasks exposed through web applications outside the app directory but able to act on app-local files, including Markdown document operations and dashboard controls for mode/session behavior.
change_reason: Update the GT-KB/application isolation phased planning record to include dashboard control-plane operations as a distinct planning mechanism and backlog phase.
